name: Taco Tartlets
recipeInstructions:
1. To make meat shells, combine ingredients: Mix well.
2. Press the meat mixture into the bottom and sides of tiny tart pans and set aside.
3. Combine sour cream, taco sauce, olives, and 3/4 cups tortilla chips for the filling.
4. Spoon the filling into each shell, mounding slightly.
5. Combine the remaining chips and cheese.
6. Sprinkle over each tartlet.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
8. Yield: 32 tartlets
- VIVIAN THIELE (NRHF19C)
